gazette: Official Gazette dated 20 March 2024 and numbered 32495
title: A temporary protection measure decision has been taken for fluting and testliner papers
bodyHtml:
A temporary protection measure will be applied for fluting and testliner type papers.

Following the investigation conducted by the Board of Evaluation of Import Protection Measures, the following goods with their HS codes and descriptions are subject to temporary measures:

Temporary measures will be applied for a period of 200 days.

An additional financial obligation of "200 US Dollars per ton" will be determined as the temporary measure.

Exemption will be granted to developing countries.

The implementation of the protection measure will begin upon the entry into force of the relevant Presidential Decision.

The HS codes covered by the measure are listed below:

  • Primary fiber corrugated (fluting) paper:

     4805.11.00.00.00 - - Semi-chemical wood pulp corrugated (fluting) paper

     4805.12.00.00.00 - - Semi-chemical straw pulp corrugated (fluting) paper

     4805.19.10.00.00 - - - Secondary fiber (Wellenstoff)

     4805.19.90.00.00 - - - Others

  • Testliner (recycled liner board):

   4805.24.00.00.00 - - Weighing 150 g/m2 or less

     4805.25.00.00.00 - - Weighing more than 150 g/m2

Please refer to the Notification on Import Protection Measures (No: 2024/5) and the investigation report for further details.
